game_info.title: Hop 3D
game_info.concept:
Bounce off tiles and make as many hops as you can in this mind-blowing arcade action!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/hop/id1154436120

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Bounce off tiles and make as many hops as you can in this mind-blowing arcade action!

Touch the screen and drag left or right to guide the ball from tile to tile. Don’t miss the path! Make insane combos and beat your friend's scores!

What is your best score?
game_info.description: Hop 3D is a fast-paced arcade rhythm game where you guide a bouncing ball across an endless path of floating tiles. The ball bounces automatically, and your goal is to navigate left and right to land on the tiles. As you progress, the speed increases, and the path becomes more treacherous with moving platforms and narrow landings. Collect diamonds for bonus points and aim for the center of tiles for "Perfect" landings!
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start the game
- Arrow Left / A: Move Left
- Arrow Right / D: Move Right
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (after Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify game initialization and state transition.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate pressing ENTER on the Start Screen. Check if gamePhase transitions from START to PLAYING and if the player entity exists.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: gamePhase should be "PLAYING". Player object should be initialized at the starting position.
TEST_1.description: Verify game initialization and state transition.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate pressing ENTER on the Start Screen. Check if gamePhase transitions from START to PLAYING and if the player entity exists.
TEST_1.expected: gamePhase should be "PLAYING". Player object should be initialized at the starting position.

TEST_2.strategy_description: During gameplay, simulate holding the Right Arrow key for 1 second. Measure the change in the player's X position.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player X position should be significantly greater than the starting X position, confirming lateral movement logic.
TEST_2.strategy: During gameplay, simulate holding the Right Arrow key for 1 second. Measure the change in the player's X position.
TEST_2.expected: Player X position should be significantly greater than the starting X position, confirming lateral movement logic.

test_2_ModeBtn.expected: Player X position should be significantly greater than the starting X position, confirming lateral movement logic.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Monitor the player's vertical velocity (Y) over several frames. Confirm it decreases due to gravity and resets (bounces) upon collision with a tile.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Velocity Y should oscillate positive (bounce) and negative (fall). The player should not fall infinitely below Y=0 while on a tile.
TEST_3.strategy: Monitor the player's vertical velocity (Y) over several frames. Confirm it decreases due to gravity and resets (bounces) upon collision with a tile.
TEST_3.expected: Velocity Y should oscillate positive (bounce) and negative (fall). The player should not fall infinitely below Y=0 while on a tile.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Place a tile directly under the player. Force the player downwards. Verify that `checkCollisions` returns true and velocity is reversed.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player should register a collision and bounce back up. Grounded state should trigger momentarily.
TEST_4.strategy: Place a tile directly under the player. Force the player downwards. Verify that `checkCollisions` returns true and velocity is reversed.
TEST_4.expected: Player should register a collision and bounce back up. Grounded state should trigger momentarily.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify Game Over condition on falling.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Force move the player far to the left into the void. Wait for the player Y position to drop below the kill threshold.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below the threshold.
TEST_5.description: Verify Game Over condition on falling.
TEST_5.strategy: Force move the player far to the left into the void. Wait for the player Y position to drop below the kill threshold.
TEST_5.expected: gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below the threshold.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Manually position the player to land exactly in the center of a tile. Verify if the score increments by the "Perfect" bonus amount.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Score should increase, and a "Perfect" floating text entity should be spawned.
TEST_6.strategy: Manually position the player to land exactly in the center of a tile. Verify if the score increments by the "Perfect" bonus amount.
TEST_6.expected: Score should increase, and a "Perfect" floating text entity should be spawned.

TEST_7.strategy_description: Activate "TEST_2" mode (Bot). Let the bot play for 30 seconds. The bot calculates the X position of the next tile and steers towards it.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The game should remain in "PLAYING" phase for the duration, and score should be significantly higher than 0.
TEST_7.strategy: Activate "TEST_2" mode (Bot). Let the bot play for 30 seconds. The bot calculates the X position of the next tile and steers towards it.
